author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat: implement Panel on widgets (algolia/vue-instantsearch#495)
body:
* feat(ClearRefinements): implement Panel support

* feat(InfiniteHits): add Panel stories

* feat(Breadcrumb): implement Panel support

* refactor(Menu): use array to define an disjunctive prop type

* fix(Pagination): compute canRefine when page > 1

* test(RangeInput): merge default state
